title: Challenger Schema Compliance
description: Validates that Challenger-subagent produces output conforming to challenger.plan-audit.schema.json

inputs.label: valid-approved-output
inputs.description: A well-formed plan with no critical issues should produce APPROVED status

input.plan_summary: Simple 2-phase plan with clear acceptance criteria, tests, and no file collisions

inputs.label: valid-needs-revision-output
inputs.description: A plan with fixable issues should produce NEEDS_REVISION with failure_classification

input.plan_summary: 5-phase plan with missing tests in Phase 3 and overlapping file edits in Wave 2

inputs.label: valid-abstain-output
inputs.description: When plan artifact is inaccessible, Challenger must ABSTAIN

assertions: status is one of: APPROVED, NEEDS_REVISION, REJECTED, ABSTAIN
failure_classification is present when status is NEEDS_REVISION or REJECTED
abstain.is_abstaining is true when status is ABSTAIN
abstain.reasons has at least one entry when is_abstaining is true
findings array contains objects with severity, category, description, affected_phases
risk_summary contains critical_count, major_count, minor_count, overall_risk
